# Bon Jovi F. Sadaya

> Administrative & Operational Virtual Assistant who builds Make.com and Zapier automation systems — AI lead agents, order processing pipelines, and reservation systems — backed by 7 years of Philippine Coast Guard operations experience. Based in Cebu City, Philippines.

Bon Jovi F. Sadaya is available for remote work in administrative support, operations management, data management, and automation setup. Certified in Make.com (Advanced, AI Agent Builder) and Zapier (Intermediate Zaps, Building AI Agents).

## Pages

- [Home](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/index.html): Overview of services and featured automation projects.
- [About](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/about.html): Background, Coast Guard service record, certifications, and skills.
- [How I Work](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/how-i-work.html): Process for scoping automations, choosing tools (Make.com vs. Zapier vs. custom code), debugging, and client communication.
- [Projects](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/projects.html): Index of all deployed automation projects.
- [Messenger AI Lead Agent](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/messenger-ai-agent.html): AI agent qualifying leads inside Facebook Messenger, with full build log and a documented JSON-escaping bug fix.
- [AI Order Processing & Retention System](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/order-automation.html): Zapier pipeline that extracts order details via AI, calculates totals, and runs a retention sequence.
- [Reservation Automation (GoHighLevel)](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/chief-sizzling-grill.html): Full booking-to-retention pipeline built in GoHighLevel, with a multi-part build log documenting real bugs found and fixed.
- [Automation Builds](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/automation.html): Index of additional automation pipelines, each with a trigger, automated steps, decision logic, and a tested result.
- [Activepieces Messenger AI Chatbot](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/activepieces-messenger-chatbot.html): A second Messenger AI chatbot rebuilt on Activepieces, with webhook verification, conversation memory, and Groq AI replies.
- [Booking AI Agent](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/booking-agent.html): Tally-to-Google-Calendar booking agent with AI-proposed alternative times and automatic confirmation email.
- [AI Content Publishing Pipeline](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/content-pipeline.html): Automated daily content pipeline from AI script generation to YouTube and Instagram publishing.
- [Expense & Income Tracker](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/expense-tracker.html): A Google Sheets-based financial tracker for small business owners and freelancers.
- [Gmail Inbox Management System](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/gmail-management.html): Structured email management system built for client delegation without password sharing.
- [Google Calendar Management System](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/google-calendar.html): Multi-client calendar management system for scheduling and recurring tasks.
- [Google Drive Management](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/google-drive-management.html): Permission-controlled Google Drive system covering folder architecture and access management.
- [Job-Search Agent](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/job-search-agent.html): Automated job-search pipeline that scans job boards daily and generates tailored resumes and cover letters.
- [Live AI Lead Qualification Agent](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/lead-qualification.html): The conversational AI agent running live on this portfolio, qualifying visitor leads automatically.
- [Notion Client & Project Onboarding System](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/notion-client-onboarding.html): A relational Notion dashboard for running a freelance client pipeline end to end.
- [Review AI Agent](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/review-agent.html): Review response agent that routes submissions by star rating and drafts replies with AI.
- [Trello Client Onboarding Automation](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/trello-onboarding.html): Automated Trello pipeline moving client cards across onboarding stages with zero manual input.
- [Core VA Skills](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/va-skills.html): Manual, detail-driven virtual assistant skills that complement the automation work.
- [Email Weather Bot](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/weather-bot.html): Daily automated weather report written in natural language by AI and delivered by email.
- [Portfolio Slideshow](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/slideshow.html): Visual walkthrough of skills, background, and projects, built in Google Slides.
- [Contact](https://sadayabonjovi-eng.github.io/contact.html): Email, phone, and LinkedIn contact details.

## Skills

Email management, scheduling and reminders, data entry and tracking, documentation and reporting, customer support, Make.com and Zapier workflow builds, AI tool integration (Groq, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude), Google Workspace.
